content:
✨ termora | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing a modern, feature-rich terminal emulator and SSH client for developers and system administrators across multiple operating systems.
✨ Key Features: • Cross-platform support • Built-in key manager • X11 forwarding • SSH-Agent integration • System information display
📖 Summary: Termora is a cross-platform terminal emulator and SSH client for Windows, macOS, and Linux, built with Kotlin/JVM. It aims for full platform support and offers features like a built-in key manager, X11 forwarding, SSH-Agent integration, and GUI-based SFTP file management.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
